programme.desc: While wandering through the State Fair, CatDog find themselves expertly riding a ferocious bucking bull. Dentist Rancid Rabbit finds out that whatever Dog eats affects Cat's teeth, and vice versa.

programme.desc: Avast ye landlubbers! This is a salty old fisherman's tale about the Swordfish on CatDog's living-room wall./Cat suffers an identity crisis when a gang of alley-cats set up shop near the CatDog house.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog become the seeing eye dog for blind billionaire TJ Wolfington. After an accident pumping iron, Cliff becomes a changed dog and vows to stop doing mean things.

programme.desc: To save money on electric bills, Cat hooks the hyperkinetic Dog up to a treadmill in order to create his own juice. Cat meticulously cleans the house in preparation for a visit from Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg is terrified by a huge, giant cat that reminds everyone of the movie monster Catzilla. CatDog go down to Nearburg Cove to find the fabled treasure that sank with the pirate Orange Beard.

programme.desc: Sibling rivalry runs rampant when Mom and Dad come to visit the CatDog home. /Ever have a meat problem? Dog has one when he finds out that his favorite source of nutrition in fact comes from animals and his friends are all animals!

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat begins to work out furiously in order to stand up to the Greaser Dogs, who have stolen CatDog's frisbee. Dog becomes attached to a small toy cat he has purchased and decides to name it Little Cat.

programme.desc: Is this the end of CatDog? Fed up with being a two-headed freak, Cat elects to have surgery to separate himself from Dog. CatDog once again run for their lives from the Greaser Dogs to the safety of their house.

programme.desc: Dog is excited because today is Kooky Prank Day, Nearburg's version of April Fool's Day. CatDog prepare to go back to their old school reunion, where Cat wants to rekindle his romance with Sally Chenille.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat tries out for the musical theater production of Abe Lincoln: Superstar! but is dismayed when Dog inadvertently gets the lead role. Dog discovers that another canine has tresspassed upon his favorite fire hydrant.

programme.desc: It's Garbage Day and Dog can't resist his natural doggie urge to chase the garbage truck. Dog wants to drag Cat to Taco Depot.

programme.desc: Cat tries to teach Dog the finer points of golf. Dog gets a serious case of the sneezes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aja says she is tired of caring for her entitled, drug-addicted mother, Janet, by allowing her to live with her for 8 of 10 years of her own marriage. Aja cites costs of $100,000. Janet rejects: she pays rent & regularly goes to Narcotics Anonymous.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "fat guy" Eric was 560 lbs, so he decided to go on an epic bike ride across America. His goals were to lose weight, write a book & repair his relationship with his wife. His story went viral, as critics said Eric was scamming America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Things heat up as Tiffany's brother accuses mom Wanda of stealing his wife's wedding rings! Plus, find out what Tiffany says to cause her dad to jump out of his seat in the audience & make his way to stage. Can Dr. Phil help this family communicate? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Morgan, 20, was found dead, a suspected overdose with a later ruling of death by suicide. Parents Toni & Steve believe something more sinister: she was stalked, tormented & killed by Brooke, 18, who joins the show with her dad, Jim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2012, Amanda accused her ex-husband, George, a U.S. Army veteran, of molesting her then 7-year-old daughter, & he was sentenced to life in prison. George's parents, Harold and Cindy, believe their son was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee's husband, Kirby, made headlines after she videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. What made Renee decide to record it and turn Kirby in to police? Is there any chance of saving this marriage? Plus, updates on some memorable former guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet 15-year-old Marie who says she is now pregnant after running away three times. Dr. Phil confronts Marie about a prenatal regimen, her plan and ensuing drama over a pregnancy test request. Dr. Phil and the family discuss pregnancy test results. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil sits down with mom Cindy with footage of her daughter Sarah's street life: prostitution, smoking crack cocaine and shooting heroin. Twin Tecoa tells how it began. Off the streets and into The Dr. Phil House, will the girls commit to rehab? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How did 21-year-old Jenna go from being a straight-A UC Berkeley student and former beauty queen to abusing heroin and meth and used as sexual currency in a drug house? Her mom is desperate to save her only child and turns to Dr. Phil for intervention.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E012) Brandon gets an unexpected taste of fatherhood when he asks his classmate Melissa for a date-then has to baby-sit her infant son while she has a college interview.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E015) A weekend in Palm Springs goes awry when David invites Steve, Kelly and Donna to join him at his grandparents' house while they're away on a cruise-but he gets the dates confused, and they're still there.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E018) The Walsh twins and all their friends are panicked by the upcoming SATs, but then everything gets put in perspective when Brenda finds a lump in her breast and faces a test no one can prepare for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E019) Brandon interviews a classmate, Roger, who's an outstanding athlete and student--and haunted by the overbearing success of his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando aparecen víctimas de disparos en el área de Los Ángeles en una posible relación con actividades criminales, la UAC busca a un justiciero sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a Los Ángeles para colaborar con el equipo local en la investigación de un asesinato, que pronto se convierte en algo mucho más grande. Mientras tanto, Tony empieza a investigar la vida privada de Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, Gibbs y McGee siguen colaborando con la división del NCIS para rastrear a un grupo terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un agente de ICE tras una brecha de seguridad en la casa del Secretario de la Marina, el equipo del NCIS tiene que colaborar con el FBI y el ICE para resolver el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de la confrontación entre Tony y Rivkin, el equipo del NCIS viaja a Israel para una confrontación final, pero no son bien recibidos por el padre de Ziva, que es el jefe del Mossad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Confessions Of A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Mientras el inconformista creador de los programas de juegos favoritos de EE. UU. gana notoriedad por sus éxitos, se ve atraído al mundo de las operaciones encubiertas del gobierno. George Clooney dirige esta historia más extraña que la ficción.

programme.title: Casi famosos
programme.desc: Un chico de secundaria tiene la oportunidad de escribir una historia para la revista Rolling Stone sobre una banda emergente mientras los acompaña en su gira.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: Una auténtica historia del mundo de las carreras en el momento de la depresión, cuyas victorias animaron no solo a los espíritus del equipo que los apoyaba, sino también a toda una nación.

programme.title: Pelota Dura
programme.desc: Un joven desubicado quien apuesta y bebe, acepta ser el entrenador de un equipo de las pequeñas ligas de Cambrini Green en Chicago como condición de un préstamo que le hizo un amigo.

programme.title: Misión imposible 5: Nación secreta
programme.desc: Ethan y su equipo se embarcan en su misión más imposible hasta ahora, erradicando el Sindicato, una organización internacional ilegal tan altamente capacitada como ellos, comprometida con la destrucción del FMI.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales: unas vacaciones para morir
programme.desc: Mike Fallon está de regreso y debe vencer a los mejores asesinos del mundo, para proteger al hijo de un jefe de la mafia, salvar la vida de su único amigo y reavivar su relación con su figura paterna.

programme.title: Misión imposible 4: Protocolo fantasma
programme.desc: El FMI se cierra cuando participa en el bombardeo del Kremlin, lo que provoca que Ethan Hunt y su nuevo equipo se conviertan en rebeldes para limpiar el nombre de su organización.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Misión: Imposible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt se enfrenta cara a cara con un traficante de armas peligroso y sádico al tratar de mantener su identidad en secreto para proteger a su novia.

programme.title: El hombre de la máscara de hierro
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio lidera un elenco fenomenal en esta emocionante historia de majestad y mosqueteros. Cuando el arrogante rey Luis XIV de Francia comienzan a amenazar la vida de sus súbditos, ¡los legendarios mosqueteros se reúnen para salvar su país!

programme.title: El huésped
programme.desc: Cuando un enemigo invisible amenaza a la humanidad al tomar los cuerpos de humanos y borrarles la mente, Melanie Stryder arriesga todo para proteger a la gente que más quiere.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Noé
programme.desc: Russell Crowe interpreta a Noé, en la historia llena de valor, sacrificio y esperanza. Esta impactante aventura de acción es aclamada como "una de las más inolvidables historias bíblicas llevadas a la pantalla". (Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times).

programme.title: Rango (ESP)

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood
programme.desc: Las papas queman en esta comedia-acción de ritmo veloz, con la actuación estelar de Eddie Murphy como Axel Foley, un listo policía de las calles de Detroit, que rastrea al asesino de su mejor amigo en Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Cerca de tu casa
programme.desc: An evicted mother, a banker with a conscience, and a police officer who must do his job no matter what, sing and dance in this Brechtian musical drama about the economic crisis, people’s struggle with daily life, solidarity and hope.

programme.title: Amor letra por letra
programme.desc: Una historia de amor accidental, dinero y recuerdos familiares cargada de comedia y risas. Una comedia romántica que derrocha amor y alegría.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba a ladrón
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba a ladrón

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 2: Texas sangriento
programme.desc: Cuando una pandilla de ladrones de bancos escapa hacia la frontera, terminan en el bar equivocado y se meten con los vampiros equivocados. ¡Será una batalla de matar o morir para frenar a estas criaturas malignas y sobrevivir!

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: The Last Round-Up
programme.desc: Gene Autry is a cattle rancher determined to protect the interests of neighboring ranchers and Indians against unscrupulous land manipulators when local authorities plan to build an aqueduct.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The Gunfighter
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Dark Command
programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Who's Minding The Store?
programme.desc: An incompetent young man is given a job in a department store by his girlfriend's mother, who hopes to put an end to their romance.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying (1967)
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told
programme.desc: Max Von Sydow, John Wayne, Charlton Heston, Sidney Poitier, and Shelley Winters head an all-star cast in this lavish portrayal of the life of Jesus from legendary director George Stevens. This stunning epic truly is The Greatest Story Ever Told.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Sally's cousin Suzanne will fail out of college if she doesn't get her grades up, but she spends more time thinking about boys than studying.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.desc: Bobby Jo's boyfriend Orrin finally manages to make friends with Uncle Joe when he rescues the old fellow from a hungry bear.

programme.desc: An industrialist registers at the Shady Rest and offers Uncle Joe a chance to make a fortune.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Later, High School. Hello New York City! In THE REST OF MY LIFE, Degrassi grads and friends dive into the summer that will change their lives forever. And what’s summer without a little romance – or a wedding...

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive Klee Kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Encouraged by her popular support after the shooting, Alexis decides to stay in the race; Sean speeds up his plan to use the Vitron oil deal to crush Alexis; Karen is unnerved by the return of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tired of Leslie's threats to expose his true identity, Sean plants a poisonous snake in her room as a warning of who she is dealing with; having second thoughts about accepting Adam's bribe to stay away from Karen, Jesse gives the money back.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following the explosion in Natumbre, Blake is accused of dealing in illegal arms; Alexis uncovers proof that Sean paid Jesse to return to Denver so he could persuade Karen to keep Adam's baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dana tries desperately to convince Adam how much she wants their son. She proposes that if they were a loving couple again, the judge would find in their favor. Still hurting from her outburst in court, Adam is cold to her pleas.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam is absolved of suspicion in the kidnapping of his son when Leslie calls him to say that Sean has taken the baby and is holding her captive. Adam and Steven hurry to the desolate mountain cabin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each other; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo and Jeff are relieved when they discover the body found floating in the lake is not Krystle; Blake's fears increase when Krystle's car is found and the man arrested for stealing it is a convicted murderer.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty-five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Cattle Drive continues with various difficulties to overcome, including conflicts between Matthew and Sully, cattle rustlers, hungry Indians, and a prairie fire. Dr. Mike delivers a calf, and Sully helps her clean up afterwards.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Elizabeth sends crates of books from Michaela's deceased father's collection, prompting her to open a public library. Many become alarmed at the content of some of the books and want to prevent people from reading them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Jackie Chan's Project A2 (A Gai Waak Juk Jaap)
programme.desc: Dragon Mao is assigned to lead the local police force but soon discovers that police corruption is running wild right under his nose. When he's framed for a jewelry robbery, Dragon Mao must fight to clear his name.

programme.title: Wheels On Meals
programme.desc: Action-packed and full of fun, set off on a wacky adventure with kung-fu fighting cousins Thomas and David whose simple life running a fast-food van in Spain is turned upside down by the beautiful pickpocket Sylvia.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York cops, Billy Wong and Danny Garoni, head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord, Mr. Ko.

programme.title: Xia Ri Fu Xing aka Twinkle Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: The do-gooder Lucky Stars gang takes a well-deserved break in Thailand where they are told to contact an informant. Their vacation is cut short when the informant is murdered sending them back to Hong Kong to protect his girlfriend.

programme.title: Supercop (1996)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a shrewd cop who goes undercover with a team of mercenaries when a man he put away two years before commits a murder. The film features the great Sammo Hung as well as the terrific Tony Leung Ka Fai.

programme.title: Xia Ri Fu Xing aka Twinkle Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: The do-gooder Lucky Stars gang takes a well-deserved break in Thailand where they are told to contact an informant. Their vacation is cut short when the informant is murdered sending them back to Hong Kong to protect his girlfriend.

programme.title: Supercop (1996)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy volunteer their time at the Youth Center to teach a Karate class to kids. Their teamwork gives Rita the idea for her latest monster, the "Slippery Shark.”

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly helps her insecure younger cousin Kelly try out for the Angel Grove Junior High cheerleading team. Kelly, however, feels that she cannot measure up to her beautiful talented cousin, who is still remembered for being an outstanding cheerleader.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy decides to try out for football but is afraid that he won’t be any good at it since he has never played football before. Ernie, a former football player himself, agrees to help Tommy train at the Juice Bar for his football tryout.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lately, Tommy has been having trouble remembering things. When Mrs. Appleby gives her class an assignment that requires the students to change their biggest faults, the teens decide to help Tommy deal with his forgetfulness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: As Angela's birthday approaches, Zack would like to win her affections again by buying her a pair of pearl earrings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita Repulsa's minions abandon her when an even more evil menace arrives at the Moon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd steals the power of the Zords away from the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Caroline feel like poor relatives when they attend their high-school reunion in Milwaukee.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura's sign-language pupil (Alban Branton) falls in love with her.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A fire at the School for the Blind kills two people, one Mary's son.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The loss of her baby shatters Mary; the residents attempt to recover from the shock.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles hopes Laura's affections will shift to Almanzo's flamboyant younger brother.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: His wife's nagging sends Nels on the road, where he meets a charming woman (Suzanne Rogers).

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Almanzo realizes Laura's maturity when she passes the teaching exam and receives her license.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Almanzo leaves town after Laura is forced to refuse his marriage proposal; the Olesons hire a young accountant.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura thinks that Almanzo's departure means that he has a new girlfriend; Nellie undergoes a change due to Percival.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock finds himself in a legal dilemma: his client stuns the courtroom with a confession, and then, saying that government agents had persuaded her to do so, tries to recant it.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock tries to defend hard-drinking country singer Jimmy Legrand after he’s arrested for the murder of his wife’s sister, but Legrand was so drunk on the night of the crime that he honestly can’t remember if he killed her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock travels to Las Vegas to defend a friend, Lt. Jim Manning, charged with murdering his girlfriend, Laura, a young woman who was living a double life.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Julie March becomes Ben Matlock’s houseguest at an inopportune time in their relationship. Julie is the prosecuting attorney in a murder case that has Ben defending dance instructor Scott Lazar for the hit-and-run death of his benefactor – and lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: When a hotel owner dies, the manager misses the reading of the will that names him part-owner.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The near decapitation of the local postman, whose hyperactive libido also makes him the village lothario, leads to a series of grisly murders involving other promiscuous villagers.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of a local beauty is discovered by the pool at her manor house, Barnaby and Troy uncover a seedy world of adultery and deceit within the affluent rural community.

programme.desc: Still sore, David keeps James out of a deal with a mystery client; Josh Flagg tries to unload a teardown property; Josh Altman strives to win over a new client while enduring pressure from his visiting parents to have children.

programme.desc: Josh Altman's prank on Josh Flagg leads to a confrontation that turns personal; James pulls off a sentimental surprise for his wife on their 5-year anniversary; Josh Altman confesses to a change of heart regarding his future with Heather.

programme.desc: When NBA player Kris Humphries shows an interest in James and David's listing, the Brits seek to steal the deal; MLB player Brian Wilson makes quirky demands, throwing Josh Altman off his game; Josh Flagg's client has a tiny budget.

programme.desc: James works with Madison Hildebrand to find a home in Malibu for a British millionaire who has a fear of heights; Josh Flagg struggles to move on after losing his grandmother, Edith; Josh Altman and the Brits engage in an epic negotiation session.

programme.desc: Josh Altman and Josh Flagg have an explosive showdown; Madison works against the clock to close the deal on his PCH listing; David enlists James' help to deal with the sale of his own home; Josh Altman celebrates the launch of his book.
